description: Use store tools to browse the product catalog, place a customer order, and confirm payment. The task has persistent DB side effects: stock is reduced and customer balance is deducted upon successful checkout.
initial_user_message: Hi! I'm customer C-101 (Alex Torres). I'd like to buy 1 × Wireless Headphones and 2 × USB-C Hub 7-Port. Please check the catalog first so you can confirm availability, then place the order and process my payment.
name: Online Store — Place and Pay for an Order (typed state)

guidance: Always call list_products before placing an order to confirm availability.
Verify the customer account with get_customer before charging.
Report the final order ID and remaining balance to the customer.

user_simulator.backstory: You are customer Alex Torres (C-101) checking that the assistant can correctly use the shop tools to place your order and process payment. Confirm when the assistant tells you the order is placed and paid, then end the conversation with ###STOP###.
